notes: Small ISP email solution vendor; PushMail product profiled by Aberdeen in 1997; no record of survival through ISP consolidation era
ISP market grew from 1400 providers in early 1996 to ~3000 by 1997; consolidated dramatically by 2000
Example of ISP that survived consolidation by acquiring smaller providers; grew to 320000 customers by 1997
Dominant consumer ISP with 20 million subscribers by 2000; the type of large player Aberdeen warned would enter ISP market
